description: The ListAttribute class describes an attribute defining a cell or set of cells in a List Component.

members.name: text
members.description: Get or set contents.

members.name: textColor
members.description: Get or set text color. In the form of a tuple (r, g, b, a).

members.name: textJustify
members.description: Get or set text justification. Value is one of: JustifyType.TOPLEFT, JustifyType.TOPCENTER, JustifyType.TOPRIGHT, JustifyType.CENTERLEFT, JustifyType.CENTER, JustifyType.CENTERRIGHT, JustifyType.BOTTOMLEFT, JustifyType.BOTTOMCENTER, JustifyType.BOTTOMRIGHT

members.name: textOffsetX
members.description: Get or set horizontal text offset.

members.name: textOffsetY
members.description: Get or set vertical text offset.

members.name: wordWrap
members.description: Get or set word wrapping.

members.name: help
members.description: Get or set help string when rolling over the cell.

members.name: bgColor
members.description: Get or set background color. In the form of a tuple (r, g, b, a).

members.name: fontFace
members.description: Get or set font face. Example 'verdana'.

members.name: fontFile
members.description: Get or set font file. VFS embedded files supported as well.

members.name: fontBold
members.description: Get or set whether or not text is rendered in bold font.

members.name: fontItalic
members.description: Get or set whether or not text is rendered italicized.

members.name: fontSizeX
members.description: Get or set font horizontal size.

members.name: fontSizeY
members.description: Get or set font vertical size. If not specified, uses fontSizeX.

members.name: sizeInPoints
members.description: Get or set text size units. When True size is in points, when False it is in pixels.

members.name: top
members.description: Get or set background image TOP.

members.name: topFill
members.description: Get or set background TOP fit. Values: FillMode.STRETCH, FillMode.HORIZONTAL, FillMode.VERTICAL, FillMode.BEST, FillMode.NATIVE, FillMode.OUTSIDE.

members.name: topBorderInColor
members.description: Get or set inside top color. In the form of a tuple (r, g, b, a).

members.name: topBorderOutColor
members.description: Get or set outside top color. In the form of a tuple (r, g, b, a).

members.name: bottomBorderInColor
members.description: Get or set inside bottom color. In the form of a tuple (r, g, b, a).

members.name: bottomBorderOutColor
members.description: Get or set outside bottom color. In the form of a tuple (r, g, b, a).

members.name: leftBorderInColor
members.description: Get or set inside left color. In the form of a tuple (r, g, b, a).

members.name: leftBorderOutColor
members.description: Get or set outside left color. In the form of a tuple (r, g, b, a).

members.name: rightBorderInColor
members.description: Get or set inside right color. In the form of a tuple (r, g, b, a).

members.name: rightBorderOutColor
members.description: Get or set outside right color. In the form of a tuple (r, g, b, a).

members.name: colWidth
members.description: Get or set column width, expressed in pixels.

members.name: colStretch
members.description: Get or set column stretchiness. When True, colWidth specifies minimum width.

members.name: rowHeight
members.description: Get or set row height, expressed in pixels.

members.name: rowStretch
members.description: Get or set row stretchiness. When True, rowWidth specifies minimum width.

members.name: rowIndent
members.description: Get or set row indent, expressed in pixels.

members.name: editable
members.description: Get or set whether or not contents are editable. When True, contents can be edited by clicking on the cell.

members.name: draggable
members.description: Get or set whether or not cell is draggable.

members.name: focus
members.description: Returns True if the cell/row/column/table is currently being edited.

members.name: radio
members.description: Returns true if the mouse last selected the cell/row/column/table.

members.name: rollover
members.description: Returns true if the mouse is currently over the cell/row/column/table.

members.name: select
members.description: Returns true if the mouse is currently pressed over the cell/row/column/table.

_provenance.fact: scraped from the ListAttribute Class wiki page
